# A Burglar Indeed!

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Title.*

---

Attach to a hero. Limit 1 per hero.
**Action**: Exhaust A Burglar Indeed! to choose a card with a guarded attachment. Deal 1 damage to that card if it is an enemy, or place 1 progress on that card if it is a location (deal 2 damage or place 2 progress instead if attached hero is Bilbo Baggins).

---

> *…he lifted it, shut his eyes, and put it in his deepest pocket. “Now I am a burglar indeed!” thought he. —Bilbo Baggins, The Hobbit*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Shire's Reckoning]] #19
